feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot read the preceding sales document items.
entry.content:
I am trying to do INDIVIDUAL PURCHASE ORDER BUT HAVING THIS ERROR..

 

WHATS THE EXACT CONFIGURATION MISSING..

 

ANY HELP IS MUCH APPRECIATED

entry.title: Shipping Point Determination ME2ON
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

we are trying to create a delivery via ME2ON, the shipping point determination is working fine. We are trying to change the determined shipping point manually, when creating the delivery, however the system creates the delivery with the determined shipping point, even though we changed it manually. We also assigned the inputed shipping point as manual shipping point in the customizing.

Regards

Clemens

entry.title: Issue related with missing pricing procedure
entry.content: On PO I would like to add freight conditions FRB1/FRB2 but it is not possible. The system gives error message that the correct procedure is not in the place - condition XXX is missing in pricing procedure A M ZIMPOR. Please help to solve this issue.

entry.title: QR code on sales billing document
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

Can SAP S/4HANA Cloud generate a payment QR code for sales invoice? QR code that would be printed on the PDF invoice form and can be used for the reimbursement of the billing document?

Thank you very much in advance for any feedback.

Klara

entry.title: Starting SAP SD career with siebel CRM experience
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm currently working for siebel CRM and would like to learn SAP SD module

Please suggest better ways , whether we can learn online or institution

entry.title: V.23 report displays rejected sales documents with billing block
entry.content:
A sales order with billing block is fully rejected, but V.23 does still list it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to sell services (Time ) to customers with one condition ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I want to sell services (Time ) to customers per hour with the following condition:

the first 8 hours free

they pay for any extra hour

1_ how to create material number with this condition

2_ how to create sales order with this condition

entry.title: Maximum Limit of records in material determination
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to store almost 1 million materials which we want to identify based on some unique codes. For this we are thinking of using Material Determination. Hence the question is, can material determination support more than 1 million records and will it impact heavily on the index search.

Also, i have noticed that vb11 will simply overwrite the duplicate entry, so is there any way to restrict that. Since with so many records duplicates can be mistakenly entered.

If someone knows any other alternatives also, it would be helpful.

entry.title: PICK&PACK DELIVERY LOCK
entry.content:
Hi,

We currently use  pick&pack, tcode LM46 function to pick and pack deliveries. The problem is that LM46 is not blocking the delivery for other users, while an rf user is doing the pick&pack, another office user enters to modify de delivery or shipment, and when the rf user is going to confirm a new line, it´s him who receives the message; that the delivery is being processed and cannot continue. I don´t know if it can be configured so that this does not happen. If we confirm an TO with LT12, the delivery is blocked for other users while the TO is being treated. We are in ECC 6.7

Thanks in advance.

Teo Pérez.

entry.title: Replacement for Function CREDIT_EXPOSURE
entry.content:
I'm looking for the replacement function for CREDIT_EXPOSURE in SAP HANA Systems, where CREDIT_EXPOSURE still reads from the old tables. 
UKM_MALUSLIST_PROCESSING looks promising and provides some data, but misses OPEN_* return parameters.
Any hints or strategies how to find them appreciated.

entry.title: IDoc DEBMAS07 - how to update KNVV-LIFSD (delivery block) with blank value
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to update KNVV-LIFSD of customer accounts with valid values, for example XX in IDoc DEBMAS under segment E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM.

Then I want to clear the delivery block for some accounts. So what I do is I populate the field LIFSD as blank under E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM. However, it gives me the error "Field KNVV-LIFSD . is not an input field"

Does anyone know how to clear KNVV-LIFSD with IDoc?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Multiple billing document creation for zero quantity and Status completion is not feasible in VF04
Authorization as validation on VF04
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

Can we add validation from VF04?

Sample:
User have a object roles Sales Org "ABC" and Shipping Point "1234" and Delivery Order Doc have a LIKP - VKORG = ABC and LIKP - VSTEL = 1234

Scenario:
User want to create Billing in VF04 with a Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online,

My Plan is Program logic read Object Roles first then Read the Delivery Order Doc. If the information from both matches, generate Billing Document when user klik Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online

but if the information from both doesn't match, Billing not generated and error messages appears "No Authorization for this Sales Org and Shipping Point"


Please for the advice

Regards,

entry.title: [SAP Fiori: Sales and Distribution] Missing prices?
entry.content:
Greetings!

When I was entering the materials (ORMN1277 and ORWN1277) on the Create Inquiry page, I came across a problem. The materials have no prices added. Is that okay? Or should I change something somewhere? Because when wanting to enter a price on the Create Inquiry: Item Data page, the price couldn't be changed (it was in a grey color, not changeable - see below the screenshot).

Could someone help me out, please? I'd greatly appreciate it 😀 Thank you for your answer in advance!

entry.title: VBEP S/4 HANA VS R/3
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please indicate me the new features related to the VBEP in S/4 HANA?

In particular, compared to R/3, I've found the fields: DLVQTY_BU, DLVQTY_SU, OCDQTY_BU, OCDQTY_SU, ORDQTY_BU, ORDQTY_SU. What's the differences?

Can I use the ODN_AMOUNT to select the open value referred to the specific schedule line (not to the item)?

If i select the records related to one of the "open quantity" fields with value not equal to zero, the result is equal to VBBE?

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Field KOMV-KSCHL (13) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV45A 5002
entry.content:
Hello...
We are tryin to run a transaction to create sales orders.
And some of the systems show these 2 errors:
Field KOMV-KSCHL (13) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV45A 5002
Field KOMV-KBETR (13) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV45A 5002

Only some of the users get this error while the rest of us are able to successfully create 100s of sales orders.

I believe it has something to do with the Pricing function.
But I am not sure...

Can someone suggest something to resolve this issue?

I have read a couple other posts regarding the same and they all have different answers and was wondering if the resolution depends on the field...

Thanks,
Sharon

entry.title: Consignment Fill-Up - Intrastat Declaration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on S4H Cloud public environment and I would like to know if it is possible to report the transfert to a consignement stock (CCFU) ? Indeed, we did not create any invoice so I don't know how I can get the lines.

 

Thanks in advance,

Regards,
Nicolas.

entry.title: block delivery proposal in Sales Ordem if Customer no credit
entry.content:
Hi!

When I include a material in a Sales Order, a proposed delivery date is created.
However, if the customer does not have credit, the material is not included in the process to produce it.
When the customer obtains credit, the proposed date is not recalculated and the initial date remains.
How to automatically recalculate this date to the proposed delivery date after the customer obtains credit?

Or How in a sales order can we block delivery proposal if the customer is out of credit?Thank you!

entry.title: Sales Deals & Promotions Based on Allocated Product Qty or Allocated Budget
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
As business need that as per below 2 scenarios for sales deals & promotion;

Scenario 1: Condition records (Discount value) regards the deal are also to be maintained by marketing team with their maximum budget (every single condition record for specific material has its own maximum value that can be achieved within this material specific promotion). For example, if the material sales price is 1000$, and promotion discount value per item is 100$, and maximum budget is 500$, then the maximum quantity to be sold for this material is 5 PCs. As long as 5 PCs will achieve 500$ as discount cumulated value which is the maximum budget to be achieved within this promotion for this material.

Example:
• Material Price: 1000$
• Promotion Discount per Item: 100$
• Maximum Budget for Promotion: 500$

To calculate the maximum quantity that can be sold under this promotion:
Maximum Quantity = Maximum Budget / Promotion Discount per Item
= 500$ / 100$ = 5 PCs

So, the marketing team can sell a maximum of 5 pieces of this product under the promotion. Once 5 pieces are sold, the cumulative discount value reaches the maximum budget of 500$. After reaching this limit, the system should not apply any further discounts for this material within the promotion, ensuring that the allocated budget is not exceeded.

Scenario 2: We want to maintain the maximum quantity to be sold for specific material by achieving specified promotional discount for this material. For example, if a material’s sales price is 1000$ and promotion discount for this material is 200$ , then we make maximum quantity to be sold for is material is 5 PCs, then we can only sell 5 PCs of this material with 800$ (1000 – 200). Any additional material would be sold for 1000$.

Here's how it works:
• Material Price: 1000$
• Promotion Discount: 200$
• Maximum Quantity with Discount: 5 PCs

Now, if a customer buys 5 pieces of this product, they will get a discount of 200$ per piece, making the effective selling price 800 SAR per piece (1000 - 200). Therefore, only 5 pieces can be sold at this discounted price.


Please note that I attempted to address this scenario using sales deals and promotions (VB21, VB31), but unfortunately, I couldn't find the desired results. I kindly request advice from experts on finding an appropriate solution.
Thank you!

SD (Sales and Distribution) 

SAP Supply Chain Management

entry.title: Looking for 'Excise Duty Condition' configuration steps in Sales Order without IS-OIL Setting?
entry.content:
Hi All

I have searched so much in SAP community for Excise Duty Condition value determination without IS-OIL Component  / without TDP setting.

I Request you to please help to provide the Standard SAP configuration to achieve to determine the Excise Duty value determination in SAP Sales order.

Thanks & Regards

SJ
